refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system downtime during operation
FR2: Enable rapid recovery from faults or failures

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and predictive maintenance algorithms
DP2: Design modular system architecture to isolate faults and enable quick component replacement
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and predictive maintenance algorithms

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and recovery mechanisms
Dependency on telemetry data for predictive maintenance
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses minimizing downtime through early fault detection, with manageable coupling to recovery functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable telemetry data
Risk of false positives/negatives in fault detection impacting availability
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating recovery mechanisms explicitly in next decomposition level to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for availability management including fault detection and maintenance scheduling

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and other subsystems for fault detection

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends maintenance and recovery task commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and remote modules for data exchange and control

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of availability logic with limited diffusion across modules
Vehicle contains some fault detection sensors but limited availability logic
Primarily focused on control, minimal availability logic
Safety critical but not directly responsible for availability

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability management in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on accurate telemetry data from Vehicle and Network Link
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution and consider modularizing fault detection and recovery submodules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by focusing on fault detection to minimize downtime.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion of telemetry data handling across Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Availability logic is well contained within NGHE Solution with clear interface boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via operational data collected through Telemetry interface and system logs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Refine telemetry data quality requirements to reduce risk of false fault detection.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

decision.justification: Current decomposition level sufficiently refines the availability FR with a clear DP and IM assignment that passes all gates. No immediate need to zigzag or revise.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system downtime during operation
FR2: Enable rapid recovery from faults or failures

revise.why: No critical issues identified requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Reliable telemetry data is available and accurate.
open_risks: False positives/negatives in fault detection algorithms.
Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Availability performance metrics from system testing.
